alpha.desc: The property consists of a single primary structure located within a largely open landscape containing scattered vegetation|A paved roadway connects to a curved driveway leading to a developed area adjacent to the structure|Surrounding the building are maintained landscaped sections, multiple walkways, a large rectangular enclosed area, and additional outdoor features distributed around the site.

bravo.desc: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by landscaped areas and mature vegetation|A curved driveway provides access to a developed area adjacent to the structure where two vehicles are visible|A large rectangular enclosed feature is located beside the structure, with additional paved and landscaped areas extending around the building footprint.

charlie.desc: The view shows the primary structure centered within maintained landscaped grounds|A driveway and developed vehicle area are visible adjacent to the building|A large rectangular enclosed feature occupies one side of the property, while pathways connect landscaped sections and additional outdoor features positioned near the perimeter of the maintained grounds.

delta.desc: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by landscaped areas, vegetation, and circulation paths|A developed vehicle area containing two vehicles is visible adjacent to the structure|A large rectangular enclosed feature occupies one side of the site, while connected walkways provide access be
